design_concept.description: A high-tech, industrial warning aesthetic that communicates immediate protection. Think 'Cyberpunk Construction Zone' meets 'Elite Security Unit'. The visual language is built on the language of caution: stripes, high-contrast yellow/black, and red alerts.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text. MUST be Uppercase for H1/H2.

body.usage: Paragraphs, features description. slightly square, tech-native feel.

mono.usage: Data decorators, button labels, small 'scanning' text.

layout_strategy.spacing: Broad. Use p-12 to p-24 between sections.
layout_strategy.container_style: Sharp edges only. rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px). NO PILL SHAPES.
layout_strategy.border_style: 1px solid border-zinc-800 with active 'tracing beam' effects in Yellow.

buttons.primary: Solid #FFD700 background, Black text, bold font. Hover: Hazard stripe overlay.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, Yellow border, Yellow text. Hover: bg-yellow-900/20.
buttons.cta_special: The 'Get Protected' button must pulse with a red shadow/glow to indicate urgency.

cards.style: Glass-morphism but 'Dirty Glass'. High blur, noise texture overlay, sharp 1px yellow or zinc border.
cards.hover: Border color snaps to Yellow. Background gets slightly lighter.

hero.style: Immersive 3D/Parallax. Foreground: The Tunnel/City. Middle: Scanning Robots. Back: Family Silhouette.
hero.text_effect: Glitch text on the main 'DANGER' keywords.

hero_background.treatment: Overlay with heavy black gradient (opacity 0.7) to make text pop.

robot_scanner.treatment: Remove background if possible (or use blend-mode: screen/lighten if black background). Place small red dots around it.

family_protected.treatment: Place in background layer, behind a 'digital shield' mesh.

texture_hazard.treatment: Use as section background with low opacity (0.1) and blend-mode: overlay.

assets_instructions.icons: Use 'Lucide-React' with 'stiff' tech icons (Shield, Lock, Scan, AlertTriangle, Zap).
assets_instructions.animations: Use framer-motion. Key animation: 'Scanning Line' (a red line moving up and down over text).

universal_guidelines.transitions: Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors duration-200). DO NOT use transition-all.
universal_guidelines.alignment: Left align text generally. Center align only for massive hero headlines.
universal_guidelines.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl with a tint of zinc-900. Add a 1px white/10 border.
universal_guidelines.interactions: All interactive elements must have a :hover and :focus state. Focus ring should be Yellow.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install fonts: Barlow Condensed and Rajdhani from Google Fonts. 2. Set up Tailwind colors extending the theme. 3. Build the 'HazardStripe' utility class immediately. 4. Implement the CTA redirect logic to NoMoreScamCalls.com.
